description_long: This is a robust, dark gray helmet with a rounded dome and reinforced lower rim, designed for head protection. The front features a prominent red and white cross emblem, which is slightly weathered, suggesting use or exposure to harsh conditions. The helmet has integrated side panels that extend downward to cover the ears, with subtle geometric detailing and shallow grooves for added structure. The rear of the helmet is smooth with a horizontal band featuring vent-like ridges, while the sides display circular indents and angular lines. The surface is matte with visible scuffs and scratches, indicating durability and practical use. The interior is not visible, but the helmet likely contains padding for comfort and impact absorption.
description: A dark gray, rounded protective helmet with a red and white cross emblem on the front, reinforced sides, and a matte, weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red and white cross emblem, smooth dome, and reinforced lower rim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ear coverage, geometric paneling, and circular indent near the base.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth back with a horizontal vented band and no visible emblem.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same paneling and circular indent.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white cross emblem is present on the front center of the helmet; it is circular with a distressed appearance, but no specific brand is identified.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: A single horizontal band of shallow, vent-like ridges is present at the rear of the helmet; no open ventilation holes are visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a solid dark gray color with a single red and white cross emblem on the front; the rest of the surface is plain with visible wear and scratches.
